title: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds
summary: Raise the text/background contrast to at least 4.5:1 (3:1 for large text).
notes: Raised text contrast to meet WCAG AA

code.title: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds
code.summary: Raise the text/background contrast to at least 4.5:1 (3:1 for large text).
code.what_changed: Raise the text/background contrast to at least 4.5:1 (3:1 for large text).
code.why: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds

improvement_summary: The redesigned version fixes 'Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds'. Raise the text/background contrast to at least 4.5:1 (3:1 for large text). This addresses a serious barrier and improves conformance with WCAG 1.4.3.
highlights: Resolves a serious issue mapped to WCAG 1.4.3
